explicit_text: I was born in Middletown, Ohio, where my parents moved for work after my dad returned from the Army. My dad worked at Armco Steel there, and we lived in Middletown until I was 13. It was a place full of bluegrass musicians who would come to our house and play all night, which deeply influenced my love for music.
